title: podman go binding cannot build
body:
### Issue Description

When import the podman/v5/binding, the project will no longer be built. The build error:

```
# github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/api/handlers
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:48:9: undefined: docker.ContainersPruneReport
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:104:9: undefined: docker.VolumesPruneReport
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:108:9: undefined: docker.ImagesPruneReport
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:116:9: undefined: docker.NetworksPruneReport
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:169:9: undefined: docker.ExecConfig
```

Related information:
I used docker as well:

```
github.com/docker/docker v28.0.1+incompatible
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. go get the docker
2. go get the podman
3. go get github.com/containers/image/v5@main (otherwise the image v5 doesn't work with docker v28
4. build the project


### Describe the results you received

```
# github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/api/handlers
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:48:9: undefined: docker.ContainersPruneReport
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:104:9: undefined: docker.VolumesPruneReport
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:108:9: undefined: docker.ImagesPruneReport
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:116:9: undefined: docker.NetworksPruneReport
../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.4.2/pkg/api/handlers/types.go:169:9: undefined: docker.ExecConfig
```

### Describe the results you expected

It should build

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.

It's about podman go binding. Not related to the podman runtime. Architecture ARM64. OS: macOS 14.7.1.
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

N/A

### Additional information

N/A

comments.body:
The docker update broke some types, you would need to build the bindings from main (or soon v5.5) if you like to consume the docker update.
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25518
